Monochrome 0.96-inch OLED with 128x64 pixel resolution. SSD1306 controller over I2C. Crisp white pixels on true black background. Perfect for status readouts and telemetry panels.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Chip**: SSD1306
  - **Voltage**: 3.3V-5V
  - **Protocol**: I2C (addr 0x3C)
  - **Resolution**: 128 x 64 px
  - **Dimensions**: 27 x 27 x 4 mm
  - **Weight**: 3 g
